email_body:
Beste MUTANI-team,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Growth Marketing Internship. Jullie missie om gamingcultuur te vertalen naar draagbare mode spreekt me enorm aan. Als junior digital marketer met ervaring in SEO, content en webontwikkeling, geloof ik dat ik kan bijdragen aan jullie communitygroei voor de October launch.

Bij Episto voer ik on-page SEO uit, schrijf ik keyword-gerichte content en beheer ik WordPress-sites. Op mijn eigen project mirook.com pas ik gestructureerde data en GEO toe om zichtbaarheid te verbeteren. Deze analytische aanpak sluit naadloos aan bij de rol: data analyseren, trends herkennen en groeiexperimenten uitvoeren.

Ik ben nieuwsgierig naar wat content laat presteren en hoe communities groeien. Ik werk gestructureerd, leer snel nieuwe tools en spreek Engels en Turks; Nederlands is B1 (ik volg lessen). Ik woon in Zwijndrecht, vlakbij Antwerpen, en ben beschikbaar 2-3 dagen per week.

Ik voeg mijn CV en motivatiebrief bij. Ik hoop mijn analytische vaardigheden en passie voor gaming en fashion in te zetten bij MUTANI.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear MUTANI team,

I am very excited to apply for the Growth Marketing Internship. Your mission to translate gaming culture into wearable fashion really resonates with me. As a junior digital marketer with experience in SEO, content, and web development, I believe I can contribute to your community growth ahead of the October launch.

At Episto, I handle on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted content, and manage WordPress sites. On my own project mirook.com, I apply structured data and GEO to improve visibility. This analytical approach fits the role: analyzing data, spotting trends, and running growth experiments.

I am curious about what makes content perform and how communities grow. I work in a structured way, quickly learn new tools, and speak English and Turkish; Dutch is B1 (I am taking lessons). I live in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp, and am available 2-3 days per week.

I attach my CV and motivation letter. I hope to bring my analytical skills and passion for gaming and fashion to MUTANI.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste MUTANI-team,

Toen ik de vacature voor Growth Marketing Internship las, voelde het alsof die speciaal voor mij geschreven was. Jullie aanpak – gamingcultuur vertalen naar alledaagse fashion, geen traditionele merchandise – vind ik inspirerend. Ik wil graag bijdragen aan de communitygroei voor de October launch.

Mijn achtergrond combineert digitale marketing met een technische basis. Bij Episto optimaliseer ik websites voor zoekmachines, schrijf ik content die aansluit bij zoekintentie en beheer ik WordPress-sites. Ik analyseer data uit SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics en Search Console om te begrijpen wat werkt en waarom. Diezelfde analytische blik pas ik toe op mirook.com, waar ik met gestructureerde data en GEO de zichtbaarheid in zowel traditionele als AI-zoekmachines verbeter. Ik ben gewend om hypotheses te testen, resultaten te meten en iteratief te verbeteren – precies wat jullie zoeken.

Jullie vragen naar iemand die nieuwsgierig is naar waarom merken en creators groeien. Die nieuwsgierigheid drijft mij. Ik volg trends op sociale media, analyseer wat content laat presteren en pas die inzichten toe. Hoewel mijn ervaring vooral in SEO en content ligt, ben ik gemotiveerd om mijn vaardigheden uit te breiden naar social media growth, creator outreach en betaalde marketing. Ik leer snel en pas me makkelijk aan nieuwe tools aan.

Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (ik volg lessen). Ik woon in Zwijndrecht, op fietsafstand van Antwerpen, en ben beschikbaar 2-3 dagen per week, deels remote of op kantoor.

Ik kijk ernaar uit om met jullie kleine, ambitieuze team te werken aan de October launch. Bedankt voor jullie overweging.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear MUTANI team,

When I read the Growth Marketing Internship vacancy, it felt like it was written for me. Your approach – translating gaming culture into everyday fashion, not traditional merchandise – is inspiring. I want to contribute to the community growth for the October launch.

My background combines digital marketing with a technical foundation. At Episto, I optimize websites for search engines, write content aligned with search intent, and manage WordPress sites. I analyze data from SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, and Search Console to understand what works and why. I apply the same analytical lens to mirook.com, where I use structured data and GEO to improve visibility in both traditional and AI-powered search engines. I am used to testing hypotheses, measuring results, and iterating – exactly what you are looking for.

You ask for someone curious about why brands and creators grow. That curiosity drives me. I follow trends on social media, analyze what makes content perform, and apply those insights. Although my experience is mainly in SEO and content, I am motivated to expand into social media growth, creator outreach, and paid marketing. I learn quickly and adapt easily to new tools.

I speak fluent English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (I am taking lessons). I live in Zwijndrecht, cycling distance from Antwerp, and am available 2-3 days per week, partly remote or at the office.

I look forward to working with your small, ambitious team on the October launch. Thank you for your consideration.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
• On-page SEO, keyword research, and content writing to drive organic growth (Episto)
• Data analysis using Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs to identify trends and optimize performance
• Structured data and GEO implementation for improved visibility in AI-powered search (mirook.com)
• WordPress site building and management with Elementor/Astra, including social media integration
• B1 Dutch (actively improving), fluent English, based in Zwijndrecht near Antwerp
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Social: social media content & integration
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
